description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.
examples:
Command Examples
#
!google-gemini-send-message prompt="What is artificial intelligence?"
!google-gemini-send-message prompt="Analyze this suspicious email for potential threats" model="gemini-1.5-pro"
!google-gemini-send-message prompt="Continue our previous discussion" history='[{"role": "user", "parts": [{"text": "Hello"}]}, {"role": "model", "parts": [{"text": "Hi there! How can I help you?"}]}]'
!google-gemini-send-message prompt="What are the next investigation steps?" save_conversation=true
Conversation History Management
#

!google-gemini-send-message prompt="What is artificial intelligence?"
!google-gemini-send-message prompt="Analyze this suspicious email for potential threats" model="gemini-1.5-pro"
!google-gemini-send-message prompt="Continue our previous discussion" history='[{"role": "user", "parts": [{"text": "Hello"}]}, {"role": "model", "parts": [{"text": "Hi there! How can I help you?"}]}]'
!google-gemini-send-message prompt="What are the next investigation steps?" save_conversation=true

save_conversation=true
, the integration:

!google-gemini-send-message prompt="Continue our previous discussion" history='[{"role": "user", "parts": [{"text": "Hello"}]}, {"role": "model", "parts": [{"text": "Hi there! How can I help you?"}]}]'
!google-gemini-send-message prompt="What are the next investigation steps?" save_conversation=true
Conversation History Management
#
When
save_conversation=true
, the integration:
Automatically retrieves existing conversation history from context

!google-gemini-send-message prompt="What are the next investigation steps?" save_conversation=true
Conversation History Management
#
When
save_conversation=true
, the integration:
Automatically retrieves existing conversation history from context
Uses the last exchange (user + model response) to provide context for the current request

outputs.description: The original prompt sent to the model GoogleGemini.Chat.Response The AI model's response
outputs.name: GoogleGemini.Chat.Prompt

outputs.description: The model used for generation GoogleGemini.Chat.Temperature The temperature parameter used for response generation
outputs.name: GoogleGemini.Chat.Model

outputs.description: Complete conversation history (when save_conversation=true) GoogleGemini.Chat.ConversationId A unique identifier, used to identify the chat session
outputs.name: GoogleGemini.Chat.History

outputs.description: !google-gemini-send-message prompt="Analyze this suspicious email for potential threats" model="gemini-1.5-pro" !google-gemini-send-message prompt="Continue our previous discussion" history='[{"role": "user", "parts": [{"text": "Hello"}]}, {"role": "model", "parts": [{"text": "Hi there! How can I help you?"}]}]' !google-gemini-send-message prompt="What are the next investigation steps?" save_conversation=true
outputs.name: !google-gemini-send-message prompt="What is artificial intelligence?"

outputs.description: save_conversation=true , the integration: Automatically retrieves existing conversation history from context
outputs.name: When

outputs.description: Saves the complete updated conversation history to GoogleGemini.Chat.History Allows analysts to maintain conversation continuity without manually managing JSON history
outputs.name: Uses the last exchange (user + model response) to provide context for the current request
